definition.name: NXspreading
definition.doc:
This is a NeXus-compliant definition for Spreading Resistance Profiling experiments developed at CNR IMM Catania for local use and in the context of the NFFA-DI infrastructure.
This definition describes Spreading Resistance Profiling experiments performed at CNR IMM Catania.
This definition has been tailored around the SRP data produced by our facility only. It has been tested and discussed with expert technologists working with the facility, but does not take into account similar instrumentations in other labs. As such, this definition serves as a form of documentation, and a possible starting point for further standardization within the NeXus file format which would require a broaded discussion community.

symbols.doc: Variables used throughout the document, e.g. dimensions or parameters. -->

field.name: definition
field.doc: An application definition for spreading resistance profiling.

attribute.name: version
attribute.doc: Version number to identify which definition of this application definition was used for this entry/data.

attribute.name: URL
attribute.doc: URL where to find further material (documentation, examples) relevant to the application definition.

field.name: spreading_experiment_type
field.doc: Specify the type of spreading resistance profiling.

field.name: experiment_identifier
field.doc: Unique local identifier.

field.name: experiment_location
field.doc: Where the experiment has been performed.

field.name: start_time
field.doc:
Datetime of the start of the measurement. Should be a ISO8601 date/time stamp. It is recommended to add an explicit time zone, otherwise, the local time zone is assumed per ISO8601.
It is required to enter at least one of both measurement times, either "start_time" or "end_time".

group.doc: Properties of the spreading resistance profiling equipment.

field.name: applied_force
field.doc: The weigth applied to the points. Should have units of a force or a mass. Because it does not seem like NeXus currently supports force units, units of mass are preferred.

field.name: tip_distance
field.doc: Distance between the tips for 2-probe measurements. Suggested units "um" for micrometers.

field.name: identifier
field.doc: local sample identifier

field.name: sample_structure
field.doc: e.g. N Bulk

field.name: surface_preparation_method
field.doc: What type of procedure is used for sample surface preparation. e.g. "lapping" Note: the relevant field associated to the surface preparation should be present, e.g. lapping_paste.

field.name: lapping_paste
field.doc: Details in case the surface_preparation_method is "lapping". e.g. "Diamond 0.05um"

field.name: crystallographic_orientation
field.doc: The crystallographic orientation of the exposed surface.

attribute.name: notation
attribute.doc: Notation used for the crystallographic orientation.

attribute.name: axes
attribute.doc: x-axis of the data; should be "depth".

attribute.name: signal
attribute.doc: y-axis of the data for the default plot.

attribute.name: auxiliary_signals
attribute.doc: Other data to plot as a y-axis, e.g. signal might be "spreading_resistance" while auxiliary_signals might be ["resistivity", "carrier_concentration"].

field.name: data_type
field.doc: Select which type of data was recorded, for example spreading resistance, resistivity, or carrier concentration. It is possible to have multiple selections.

field.name: depth
field.doc: Depth in the sample from the surface

field.name: spreading_resistance
field.doc: Spreading resistance in Ohm

field.name: resistivity
field.doc: Resistivity in Ohm*cm

field.name: carrier_concentration
field.doc: Carrier concentration in number per cube centimeter.

group.doc: This subgroup is for describing post-processing used to produce data. For instance, it can be used to describe how spreading_resistance is used to derive resistivity.

field.name: description
field.doc: Describe how the data was processed.

group.name: P_calibration_data
group.doc: Describe the calibration data for P-type layers in the analyzed sample.
group.field: radius of contact of the tips used in calibration, usually in micron

field.name: tolerance
field.doc: Percentage tolerance used for the resistivity calculation

field.name: spreading_resistance
field.doc: Measured spreading resistance of the calibrated sample in Ohm.

field.name: calibrated_resistivity
field.doc: Resistivity of the calibrated sample in Ohm*cm

attribute.name: certified
attribute.doc: Whether the calibration samples are certified or not.

group.name: N_calibration_data
group.doc: Describe the calibration data for N-type layers in the analyzed sample.
group.field: Radius of contact of the tips used in calibration, usually in micron

field.name: tolerance
field.doc: Percentage tolerance used for the resistivity calculation

field.name: spreading_resistance
field.doc: Measured spreading resistance of the calibrated sample in Ohm.

field.name: calibrated_resistivity
field.doc: Resistivity of the calibrated sample in Ohm*cm

attribute.name: certified
attribute.doc: Whether the calibration samples are certified or not.

group.name: layer_model
group.doc: The layer model used for processing the data.

field.name: number_of_layers
field.doc: The number of layers in the model.

group.name: LAYER
group.doc: Describe one LAYER group for each layer in the model.

field.name: index
field.doc: Index of the layer. Starting with 1 for the fist layer from the surface.

field.name: starting_point
field.doc: Index in the data array of the first point corresponding to the layer.

field.name: ending_point
field.doc: Index in the data array of the last point corresponding to the layer.

field.name: type
field.doc: Whether the layer is P-type or N-type.

attribute.name: mode
attribute.doc: Whether the layer type has been set manually or otherwise.

field.name: thickness
field.doc: Thickness of the layer usually in micron.

field.name: method
field.doc: Method used to solve the multilayer model

field.name: junction_depth
field.doc: depth of the last point of the layer

field.name: layer_resistance
field.doc: Layer resistance in Ohms per square.

field.name: active_dose
field.doc: The depth-integral of the carrier concentration density profile.
